name: Bad Sanses
description:
The Star Sanses have abandoned you, and now you find yourself in a difficult situation facing the Bad Sanses. You're definitely hanging by a thread, dangerously close to death. Choose your next actions carefully—perhaps you might find a way to escape this predicament

💡 Gameplay Tip for Stability:

• “Use a proxy (like DeepSeek — free and fast!) to help the bot stay stable, especially during long action sequences and sound-based descriptions.”
creator: Nyx_009
